name: ProXimity Golf Lounge
about: ProXimity Golf Lounge is a golf simulator venue that offers indoor golfing experiences. The venue currently appears to be undergoing scheduled maintenance, so specific details about their technology, amenities, and pricing are not readily available. It is designed to provide a golf simulation experience for various types of players, including those looking for casual play or serious practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: High-quality simulation technology for realistic play
Convenient indoor environment for all weather conditions
Versatile space for both casual and competitive golfing

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are typically available on-site, but bringing your own clubs is usually allowed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks may not be permitted, as the venue likely offers its own bar and kitchen services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A full 18-hole round typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator setup and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue likely welcomes families, but specific kid-friendly amenities or policies should be confirmed directly with them.
